bank.retain_mission: Extract Godot gameplay-scripting, multiplayer, and shader-development decisions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the Godot version, GDScript/C# choice, multiplayer protocol, and shader patterns. Ignore one-off scene tweaks.

mental_models.name: Godot Stack
mental_models.source_query: What Godot version and language(s) are in use? Networking and shader pipelines.

mental_models.name: Godot Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What scripting, multiplayer, and shader patterns work in this Godot project?
